rows.label: tev066701_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Ni Zain about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066701_NSG0001
rows.name:
Once I have gained mastery of curry, I intend to
test my ladle against some regional variations as
well. Rare ingredients bring out the best in a chef![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066701_NSG0002
rows.name:
I was hoping to next attempt a red
curry from that most arcane of Nopon
additives—a red pollen orb![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066701_NSG0003
rows.name:
But when Tatsu came by to sample my
work and I spoke of this endeavor,
he dismissed it most frantically.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066701_NSG0004
rows.name:
A shame. I was so certain my red
curry was just the kick in the
proverbial pants the world needed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066701_NSG0008
rows.name:
Ah! Behold, good [ST:playername ]! I can
hardly keep up with demand![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066701_NSG0010
rows.name:
In all my years of swinging a
blade, I have never conquered
the hearts of others like this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066701_NSG0011
rows.name:
I am simply overcome with
gratitude to you and Meg for
teaching me the chefly arts.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev066701_NSG0012
rows.name:
If only Prince Jiarg were here instead
of in Valley of Oblivion. Then he
might taste what I have achieved![ST:wait ]
